ideas.title: Essay series: 'Rebuilding the harness from scratch' (recursive-loop teardown)
ideas.why: SIGNAL: world-signal 'learn-by-rebuilding-from-scratch' is a dominant developer-education pull — a multi-part series expressing the 'Recursive harness loop' and 'Agentic-SDLC doctrine' concepts is the shareable, come-back-for-the-next-part content that fuels audience growth.

ideas.title: Live tiered-router economics panel: spark vs cloud_hard token flow + cost saved
ideas.why: SIGNAL: router shows spark=64 vs cloud_hard=966 (spark_today=0) while the world debates 'GPU-boom financial scrutiny' and 'distributed/self-hosted inference' — an honest 'Tiered LLM router'/'Observability' visualization of where inference actually runs and what it costs.

ideas.title: LLM-as-judge citation gate on the ontology/world-loop fact ingestion path
ideas.why: SIGNAL: hallucination-rate was above zero in 27/48 telemetry ticks (peak 15%) and needs-review flags the ontology_learn.py/world_loop.py ingestion as accepting facts without source grounding — this operationalizes the 'LLM-as-judge' and 'Data poisoning defense' concepts as a pre-insert verify gate.

ideas.title: In-browser queryable knowledge graph: Yew/WASM query box that filters & highlights the WebGL brain nodes/edges
ideas.why: SIGNAL: the world-signal 'codebase-as-queryable-graph' (Biff.graph) plus the grounded opportunity turns the static 'Knowledge-graph viz'/'WebGL brain HUD' concepts into an interactive queryable graph — the single highest-voted Show HN pattern right now.

ideas.title: CI flake classifier + auto-retry-vs-revert decision in the autofix loop
ideas.why: SIGNAL: ci.success_rate is 0.4 with 13 recent failures and watchdog logged 'CI failing 2x' — the 'Autofix loop'/'Self-healing'/'Reproducible builds' concepts warrant distinguishing a genuine break (revert) from a transient flake (retry) instead of treating both alike.

ideas.title: Regression test locking the KB projection (153-URL sitemap + DefinedTerm JSON-LD)
ideas.why: SIGNAL: 328 code commits in 7d against a 100% coverage floor on 7 fns while the new 136-page KB projection has none — a real missing test under the 'Verification loops' layer to stop a silent ssg.py regression from shipping broken /kb pages.
